text: Gavin J (2026). historicaldata: Historical Finance Data via DuckDB Parquet. R package version 0.0.0.9000.

what: Get price data amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_amendments
title: Get price data amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_amendments
text: Returns amendment log showing corrections made historical price data. row records: changed, , , original value.

Get price data amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_amendments

Get the local cache directory path — hd_cache_path

what: Create a DuckDB connection for remote Parquet access — hd_connect
title: Create a DuckDB connection for remote Parquet access — hd_connect
text: Returns DBI connection ephemeral DuckDB instance. DuckDB 0.10+ supports hf://datasets/... URLs natively — httpfs needed. httpfs loaded fallback non-HF HTTPS URLs.

title: Create a DuckDB connection for remote Parquet access — hd_connect
Create a DuckDB connection for remote Parquet access — hd_connect
text: DBI connection object

text: Create DuckDB connection local cached Parquet files

Create a DuckDB connection over local cached Parquet files — hd_connect_local

title: Create a DuckDB connection over local cached Parquet files — hd_connect_local

title: Dataset registry — hd_datasets
text: Maps dataset names HF URLs, schemas, metadata. Adding new asset class = adding entry .

Dataset registry — hd_datasets
text: Named list dataset metadata

what: Download dataset(s) to local cache — hd_download
title: Download dataset(s) to local cache — hd_download
text: Downloads Parquet files HF offline use.

title: Download dataset(s) to local cache — hd_download
Download dataset(s) to local cache — hd_download
text: dataset Dataset name(s). NULL, downloads registered datasets. force TRUE, re-download even cached file exists.

text: Invisibly, paths cached files.

what: Detect price jumps across all tickers in a dataset — hd_jumps
title: Detect price jumps across all tickers in a dataset — hd_jumps
text: Finds dates absolute log return exceeds threshold. Large jumps may indicate: missing split adjustments, share consolidations, currency redenominations, genuine market events.

title: Detect price jumps across all tickers in a dataset — hd_jumps
Detect price jumps across all tickers in a dataset — hd_jumps
text: dataset Dataset name (default "equity_daily") threshold Minimum absolute log return flag (default 0.4 = ~50%) n Maximum number jumps return (default 100)

title: Detect price jumps across all tickers in a dataset — hd_jumps
text: Tibble : ticker, date, prev_close, close, log_ret, pct_change

title: Detect price jumps across all tickers in a dataset — hd_jumps

what: Lazy duckplyr query over a dataset — hd_lazy
title: Lazy duckplyr query over a dataset — hd_lazy
text: Returns unevaluated duckplyr lazy frame. Chain dplyr verbs call collect() execute.

Lazy duckplyr query over a dataset — hd_lazy
text: dataset Dataset name registry local TRUE, use local cache

title: Lazy duckplyr query over a dataset — hd_lazy
text: Lazy duckplyr frame

title: Query FRED macro series — hd_macro
text: series_id FRED series ID(s). Scalar vector. Single: "SP500". Batch: c("SP500", "VIXCLS", "DGS10"). Start date (character Date). Default: filter. End date (character Date). Default: filter. local TRUE, query local cache instead remote.

title: Query FRED macro series — hd_macro
text: Tibble date, value, series_id columns

title: Get metadata amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_metadata_amendments
text: Returns PIT log metadata changes: computed fields, enrichments, corrections. Every change metadata.parquet tracked old/new values, source, method, timestamp.

title: Get metadata amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_metadata_amendments
Get metadata amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_metadata_amendments
text: ticker Filter one ticker. NULL = . field Filter one field (e.g. "beta_3yr"). NULL = .

title: Get metadata amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_metadata_amendments
text: Tibble : ticker, field, old_value, new_value, source, method, amended_at, amended_by, reversible

title: Get metadata amendments (Point-in-Time tracking) — hd_metadata_amendments
code: hd_metadata_amendments("AAPL") #> # A tibble: 3 × 9 #>   ticker field           old_value new_value source method amended_at amended_by #>   <chr>  <chr>           <chr>     <chr>     <chr>  <chr>  <chr>      <chr>      #> 1 AAPL   beta_3yr        NA        1.143     compu… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #> 2 AAPL   three_yr_return NA        0.1801    compu… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #> 3 AAPL   ytd_return      NA        -0.038    compu… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #> # ℹ 1 more variable: reversible <lgl> hd_metadata_amendments(field = "beta_3yr") #> # A tibble: 990 × 9 #>    ticker field    old_value new_value source       method amended_at amended_by #>    <chr>  <chr>    <chr>     <chr>     <chr>        <chr>  <chr>      <chr>      #>  1 AGG    beta_3yr NA        0.058     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  2 BIL    beta_3yr NA        -0.001    computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  3 DBC    beta_3yr NA        0.191     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  4 EEM    beta_3yr NA        0.795     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  5 EFA    beta_3yr NA        0.747     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  6 GLD    beta_3yr NA        0.153     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  7 IAU    beta_3yr NA        0.151     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  8 IEF    beta_3yr NA        0.018     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #>  9 PDBC   beta_3yr NA        0.193     computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #> 10 SHY    beta_3yr NA        -0.001    computed_fr… beta=… 2026-04-1… enrich_me… #> # ℹ 980 more rows #> # ℹ 1 more variable: reversible <lgl>

what: Most volatile tickers by recent realised volatility — hd_most_volatile
title: Most volatile tickers by recent realised volatility — hd_most_volatile
text: Computes 21-day rolling annualised volatility tickers dataset returns top N. Uses single DuckDB window query full Parquet.

title: Most volatile tickers by recent realised volatility — hd_most_volatile
Most volatile tickers by recent realised volatility — hd_most_volatile
text: dataset Dataset name (default "equity_daily") n Number tickers return (default 5) window_days Rolling window trading days (default 21)

title: Most volatile tickers by recent realised volatility — hd_most_volatile
text: Tibble ticker, vol_21d, sorted vol descending

title: Most volatile tickers by recent realised volatility — hd_most_volatile

what: Query OHLCV data for one or more tickers — hd_ohlcv
title: Query OHLCV data for one or more tickers — hd_ohlcv
text: Fetches data HF-hosted Parquet via DuckDB httpfs. matching rows transferred (predicate pushdown). Accepts single ticker character vector batch queries.

title: Query OHLCV data for one or more tickers — hd_ohlcv
code: hd_ohlcv(ticker, from = NULL, to = NULL, dataset = NULL, local = FALSE)

title: Query OHLCV data for one or more tickers — hd_ohlcv
text: ticker Ticker symbol(s). Character scalar vector. Single: "AAPL". Batch: c("AAPL", "MSFT", "GOOGL"). Start date (character Date). Default: filter. End date (character Date). Default: filter. dataset Dataset name registry. NULL, auto-detected first ticker. local TRUE, query local cache instead remote.

title: Query OHLCV data for one or more tickers — hd_ohlcv
text: Tibble OHLCV data (multiple tickers stacked ticker + date)

title: Query OHLCV data for one or more tickers — hd_ohlcv

High-contrast colour palette for dark backgrounds — hd_palette
text: n Number colours (max 10)

what: Search tickers by pattern across all datasets — hd_search
title: Search tickers by pattern across all datasets — hd_search
text: Searches ticker symbols long names using regex glob patterns.

title: Search tickers by pattern across all datasets — hd_search
Search tickers by pattern across all datasets — hd_search
text: pattern Regex pattern (default) glob (contains * ?) dataset Filter one dataset (e.g. "equity_daily"). NULL = .

title: Search tickers by pattern across all datasets — hd_search
text: Tibble matching tickers metadata

title: Search tickers by pattern across all datasets — hd_search
code: hd_search("^APP")     # regex: tickers starting with APP #> # A tibble: 1 × 27 #>   ticker dataset      long_name  exchange full_exchange currency instrument_type #>   <chr>  <chr>        <chr>      <chr>    <chr>         <chr>    <chr>           #> 1 AAPL   equity_daily Apple Inc. NMS      NasdaqGS      USD      EQUITY          #> # ℹ 20 more variables: sector <chr>, industry <chr>, country <chr>, #> #   market_cap <dbl>, volume_avg <dbl>, fifty_two_week_high <dbl>, #> #   fifty_two_week_low <dbl>, expense_ratio <dbl>, yield_pct <dbl>, #> #   category <chr>, fund_family <chr>, nav_price <dbl>, beta_3yr <dbl>, #> #   ytd_return <dbl>, three_yr_return <dbl>, start_date <date>, #> #   end_date <date>, total_obs <dbl>, missing_pct <dbl>, yield_type <chr> hd_search("*coin*")   # glob: names containing "coin" #> # A tibble: 13 × 27 #>    ticker dataset      long_name exchange full_exchange currency instrument_type #>    <chr>  <chr>        <chr>     <chr>    <chr>         <chr>    <chr>           #>  1 BTC    crypto_daily Bitcoin … CCC      CCC           USD      CRYPTOCURRENCY  #>  2 DOGE   crypto_daily Dogecoin… CCC      CCC           USD      CRYPTOCURRENCY  #>  3 USDC   crypto_daily USD Coin… CCC      CCC           USD      CRYPTOCURRENCY  #>  4 1COI.L equity_daily LS 1x Co… LSE      LSE           USD      ETF             #>  5 3CNE.L equity_daily Leverage… LSE      LSE           EUR      ETF             #>  6 BITC.L equity_daily CoinShar… LSE      LSE           USD      ETF             #>  7 BTCW.L equity_daily WisdomTr… LSE      LSE           USD      ETF             #>  8 CO3S.L equity_daily Leverage… LSE      LSE           USD      ETF             #>  9 COI1.L equity_daily LS 1x Co… LSE      LSE           EUR      ETF             #> 10 COII.L equity_daily IncomeSh… LSE      LSE           GBp      ETF             #> 11 CON3.L equity_daily Leverage… LSE      LSE           USD      ETF             #> 12 ETHE.L equity_daily CoinShar… LSE      LSE           USD      ETF             #> 13 S3CO.L equity_daily Leverage… LSE      LSE           GBp      ETF             #> # ℹ 20 more variables: sector <chr>, industry <chr>, country <chr>, #> #   market_cap <dbl>, volume_avg <dbl>, fifty_two_week_high <dbl>, #> #   fifty_two_week_low <dbl>, expense_ratio <dbl>, yield_pct <dbl>, #> #   category <chr>, fund_family <chr>, nav_price <dbl>, beta_3yr <dbl>, #> #   ytd_return <dbl>, three_yr_return <dbl>, start_date <date>, #> #   end_date <date>, total_obs <dbl>, missing_pct <dbl>, yield_type <chr>

text: dataset Dataset name (e.g. "equity_daily", "crypto_daily") metric Column name rank : "market_cap", "volume_avg", "total_obs", "missing_pct" n Number tickers return (default 10) desc Sort descending? (default TRUE = largest first)

what: historicaldata: Historical Finance Data via DuckDB and Parquet — historicaldata-package
title: historicaldata: Historical Finance Data via DuckDB and Parquet — historicaldata-package
text: Code-R package providing access historical OHLCV data equities, crypto, macro series, factor returns. Data stored Parquet Hugging Face Datasets queried via DuckDB httpfs predicate pushdown. data bundled — package ships access functions dataset registry.

title: historicaldata: Historical Finance Data via DuckDB and Parquet — historicaldata-package
text: Maintainer: John Gavin john@example.com
